name: Orkney (United Kingdom)
description: A gold (yellow) field with a red Nordic cross extending to the edges.
history: Adopted by Orkney Islands Council in April 2007 after a public competition; recognises Orkney's Norse heritage as a former part of Norway (until 1472). Replaced an unofficial flag.

features.symbolism: the Nordic cross marks Orkney's Norse heritage; the gold-and-red colours derive from the historic Norwegian royal arms
